info.title: Microsoft Graph SharePoint API
info.description: Microsoft Graph API specification for SharePoint sites, lists, list items, and pages

get.description: Search across SharePoint sites in the organization. Use search=* to return all sites.
Retrieve the properties and relationships of a SharePoint site

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

get.description: Retrieve analytics data for a SharePoint site

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

get.description: Retrieve the pages in a SharePoint site

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

get.description: Retrieve the collection of lists in a SharePoint site

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

post.description: Create a new list in a SharePoint site

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

get.description: Retrieve the metadata for a list in a SharePoint site

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

patch.description: Update the properties of a SharePoint list

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

get.description: Retrieve the collection of items in a SharePoint list

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

post.description: Create a new item in a SharePoint list

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

get.description: Get the default document library (drive) for the tenant's root SharePoint site
Get the default document library (drive) for a SharePoint site. The returned id is used for file operations.

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

get.description: List all document libraries (drives) in a SharePoint site

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

get.description: Get a specific document library (drive) in a SharePoint site by its drive ID

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: drive-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the drive

get.description: Download the binary content of a file from a SharePoint document library. Returns base64-encoded content with mimeType and size.

parameters.name: drive-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the drive (document library)

parameters.name: item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the file

get.description: List the files and folders inside a SharePoint document library folder. Use the drive id from Get Site Drive.

parameters.name: drive-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the drive (document library)

parameters.name: item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the folder. Use 'root' for the root folder.

get.description: Get metadata for a file or folder. The response includes @microsoft.graph.downloadUrl which can be used directly as a download link (valid for 1 hour).

parameters.name: drive-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the drive (document library)

parameters.name: item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the file or folder

delete.description: Delete a file or folder from a SharePoint document library

parameters.name: drive-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the drive (document library)

parameters.name: item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the file or folder to delete

put.description: Upload a file (up to 4 MB) to a folder in a SharePoint document library. Provide fileContent as a base64-encoded string.

parameters.name: drive-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the drive (document library)

parameters.name: parent-item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the destination folder. Use 'root' for the root folder.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the file to create or replace (e.g. report.pdf)

get.description: Retrieve the metadata and field values of a list item

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

parameters.name: item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the list item

patch.description: Update the column values of a list item

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

parameters.name: item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the list item

delete.description: Delete a list item from a SharePoint list

parameters.name: site-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the site

parameters.name: list-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier or name of the list

parameters.name: item-id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the list item

id.description: The unique identifier of the site

displayName.description: The full title of the site

name.description: The URL-compatible short name of the site

description.description: The descriptive text for the site

webUrl.description: URL that displays the site in the browser

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the site was created

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the site was last modified

root.description: Present when this is the root site of the site collection

hostname.description: The hostname of the site collection

dataLocationCode.description: The geographic region code for where the data is stored

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results

id.description: The unique identifier of the list

displayName.description: The displayable title of the list

name.description: The URL-compatible name of the list

description.description: The descriptive text for the list

webUrl.description: URL that displays the list in the browser

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the list was created

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the list was last modified

hidden.description: Whether the list is hidden from users

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results

displayName.description: The displayable title of the list

description.description: The descriptive text for the list

displayName.description: The displayable title of the list

description.description: The descriptive text for the list

id.description: The unique identifier of the list item

webUrl.description: URL that displays the item in the browser

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the item was created

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the item was last modified

ListItemFields.description: Column values for the list item. Property names correspond to the internal names of the list columns (e.g., Title, Status).

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results

id.description: The unique identifier of the page

webUrl.description: URL that displays the page in the browser

pageLayoutType.description: The layout type of the page

createdDateTime.description: The date and time the page was created

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the page was last modified

level.description: The publishing level of the page

versionId.description: The version identifier of the page

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results

actionCount.description: The number of times the action took place

actorCount.description: The number of distinct actors that performed the action

displayName.description: The display name of the identity

id.description: The unique identifier of the identity
The unique identifier of the drive

driveType.description: The drive type: personal, business, or documentLibrary

webUrl.description: URL to the drive in the browser

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

name.description: The name of the file or folder

webUrl.description: URL to view the item in the browser

@microsoft.graph.downloadUrl.description: Pre-authenticated download URL, valid for 1 hour. Use this directly as a download link.

file.description: Present when the item is a file

folder.description: Present when the item is a folder

fileContent.description: Base64-encoded content of the file to upload

mimeType.description: MIME type of the file (e.g. application/pdf, image/png, text/plain). Defaults to application/octet-stream.

UnauthorizedError.description: Authentication credentials are missing or invalid

ForbiddenError.description: The authenticated user does not have permission to perform this operation

NotFoundError.description: The requested resource was not found

BadRequestError.description: The request is malformed or invalid

scopes.Sites.Read.All: Read items in all site collections
scopes.Sites.ReadWrite.All: Edit or delete items in all site collections
scopes.Sites.Manage.All: Create, edit, and delete items and lists in all site collections
scopes.Sites.FullControl.All: Have full control of all site collections
scopes.offline_access: Maintain access to data you have given access to

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File and folder operations in SharePoint document libraries
